productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Hex Run Pure Silver Shoe
description: 1. reebok's Hex Run shoes comes with a Smoothfit synthetic and mesh upper 2. Its in-built fullfoot Hexride technology and Pump P105 Internal offers custom Fit3. High abrasion rubber outsole and an IMEVA midsole add durability and comfort4. Comes with a removable polyurethane sockliner 5. High-abrasion rubber outsole provides increased durabilityThese hi-tech reebok Hex Run shoes are designed to keep sportsmen, athletes stable and supported while you indulge in your favorite Sports. Whether it is cricket, Basketball, running or long distance cardio walks, HexRide technology offers lightweight cushioning for your feet. HexRide is a cushioning technology which provides its user a soft cushioning feel with the comfort of a light-weight ride. The midsole of a HexRide shoe is carved out into a pattern of hexagonal spaces, which allows air to circulate continuously. It's true to size fit ensures your feet are well protected from the elements. Add these to your closet to make your feet smile.
